title: EdgarTools Platform — End-to-End Setup Runbook
summary: Step-by-step operator guide covering environment setup, AWS/Snowflake provisioning, Docker image publishing, dbt deployment, and verification for the EdgarTools data platform, including an retired non-AWS path parallel-run migration path.
scope_summary: Covers end-to-end environment setup from zero, including Terraform bootstrapping for AWS and Snowflake, warehouse CLI deployment, dbt gold table materialization, Streamlit dashboard deployment, and an retired non-AWS path parallel-run path for platform migration.
key_requirements: Terraform CLI must be 1.14.8 or a compatible 1.14.x release
Snowflake Enterprise+ edition required for dynamic tables
EDGAR_IDENTITY must be a valid SEC User-Agent string in format 'Name email@example.com'
ECR repository must exist before image push
AWS/Snowflake gold layer must remain running until retired non-AWS path output validation has passed
key_constraints: accounts/prod has prevent_destroy on the bronze bucket — terraform destroy will fail without manual removal
Do not create runner access keys; runtime uses sec_platform_runner_* service roles
sec_platform_deployer is the deployment principal; do not use it for Terraform admin applies
export_root_url must have a trailing slash on snowflake_exports/
non-AWS object storage must use workload identity — no account keys, SAS tokens, or connection strings
retired analytics platform external catalog storage must use workload identity — do not grant non-AWS object storage account keys
S3 state locking uses use_lockfile = true — no DynamoDB table required
